content.content:
1→---
     2→title: "onReport (WorkflowRouter)"
     3→---
     4→stateDiagram-v2
     5→    direction TB
     6→    [*] --> q_extract: workflowId = bytes32(metadata[0..32])
     7→    q_extract --> q_check_zero: check workflowId
     8→    q_check_zero --> q_revert_zero: workflowId == bytes32(0)
     9→    q_revert_zero --> [*]: revert InvalidZeroValue()
    10→    q_check_zero --> q_check_allowlist: workflowId != bytes32(0)
    11→    q_check_allowlist --> q_revert_wf: !s_allowlistedWorkflowIds.contains(workflowId)
    12→    q_revert_wf --> [*]: revert WorkflowIdNotAllowlisted(workflowId)
    13→    q_check_allowlist --> q_decode: workflowId is allowlisted
    14→    q_decode --> q_extract_sel: (target, data) = abi.decode(report)
    15→    q_extract_sel --> q_check_selector: selector = mload(add(data, 32))
    16→    q_check_selector --> q_call: allowlistedSelectors[target].contains(selector)
    17→    q_check_selector --> q_check_target: !allowlistedSelectors[target].contains(selector)
    18→    q_check_target --> q_revert_target: !allowlistedTargets.contains(target)
    19→    q_revert_target --> [*]: revert TargetNotAllowlisted(workflowId, target)
    20→    q_check_target --> q_revert_sel: allowlistedTargets.contains(target)
    21→    q_revert_sel --> [*]: revert SelectorNotAllowlisted(workflowId, target, selector)
    22→    q_call --> [*]: _call(target, data)
    23→
    24→    note right of q_extract
    25→        INV-001: caller must have FORWARDER_ROLE (enforced by onlyRole modifier)
